headline: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI's looming release is significantly affecting other game launches. Many publishers are avoiding its November launch window. The month is virtually empty as developers steer clear of competition.

headline: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
summary: Square Enix announced "Final Fantasy VII Revelation" as the third and final game in the remake trilogy. It will launch in spring 2027 across multiple platforms including PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and Switch 2. Footage was showcased at Summer Game Fest Live 2026.

headline: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point
summary: Control Resonant is chronologically a sequel to 2019's Control, but offers a distinct experience. Developer Remedy sees them as two sides of the same coin, not directly connected story-wise. Players can enjoy the games in any order, making Resonant a flexible entry point.

headline: Congress still can’t decide what to do about warrantless surveillance
summary: Congress is struggling to reauthorize Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act before its deadline. Legislators are no closer to a deal on the controversial warrantless surveillance program. This issue has plagued Congress before, with a previous short-term reauthorization expiring.

headline: Guild Wars 3 Officially Revealed, Beta Starts Fall 2027 For ArenaNet's Next MMORPG
summary: Guild Wars 3 was officially announced at Summer Game Fest, complete with a reveal trailer. The new MMORPG from ArenaNet is slated for PC and PS5. A beta testing phase is planned for Fall 2027.

headline: Even the RuneScape Spinoff Is Coming Out in September
summary: Another game, RuneScape: Dragonwilds, is added to the crowded September release schedule. The RuneScape spinoff is due out on September 15, 2026. It will be available across PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X and S.

headline: Gundam Rogue Orbit Revealed With Action-Packed Trailer and 2027 Release Window
summary: Gundam Rogue Orbit, a new action game, was unveiled at Summer Game Fest 2026. Bandai Namco's title will allow players to pilot their own mechs. The game is currently set for a 2027 release window.

headline: Stranger Than Heaven Release Date Revealed; Tupac Confirmed as a Character
summary: The release date for the game "Stranger Than Heaven" has been officially announced. In a surprising reveal, rapper Tupac Shakur is confirmed as a character in the game. The unexpected inclusion adds a unique element to the title.

headline: Rapist Paul Quinn's 24-year sentence an insult, says wrongly convicted Andrew Malkinson
summary: Paul Quinn received a 24-year sentence for a 2003 attack in Salford. Andrew Malkinson, wrongly convicted for the same crime, served 17 years. Malkinson condemned Quinn's sentence as an 'insult' given his own unjust imprisonment.

headline: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
summary: Downing Street criticized 'people seeking to stir division' following a post by the US vice-president. The comments came after Vance referred to Henry Nowak's death on X. Vance's post stated the 'only response is righteous anger.'

headline: Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies at 72
summary: British actor Anthony Head, known for his roles in "Buffy" and "Ted Lasso," has died at 72. Head also appeared in popular shows like "Merlin" and "Little Britain." He passed away due to complications from pneumonia.

headline: Ex-Channel 4 News host Jon Snow reveals he has Alzheimer's
summary: Long-standing Channel 4 News presenter Jon Snow has publicly disclosed his Alzheimer's diagnosis. Snow was the lead presenter for the news program for an impressive 32 years. He will document his journey navigating the diagnosis in an upcoming film.
